zh.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Southwell of Varnam Hall於1425年出生在英國越可爾費利申吉可時，他的父親John de Southwell V63歲，母親Agnes Samon54歲。他於大約1442年與Jane Curzon在英國英格蘭越可爾費利申吉可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在英國奧可福爾布萊特維爾 鮑德溫享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Southwell of Varnam Hall was born in 1425, in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Southwell V, was 63 and his mother, Agnes Samon, was 54. He married Jane Curzon about 1442, in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1475, in Brightwell Baldwin, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Southwell of Varnam Hall est né en 1425, à Feliskirk, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Southwell V, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Agnes Samon, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Jane Curzon environ 1442, à Feliskirk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1475, à Brightwell Baldwin, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Southwell of Varnam Hall 1425 in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Southwell V 63 und seine Mutter Agnes Samon 54. Er hat um 1442 in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Curzon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Brightwell Baldwin, Oxfordshire, England.

Lui sposato Jane Curzon circa 1442, nel Feliskirk, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: John Southwell of Varnam Hall(이)가 1425년 영국 요르크실르 펠리스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Southwell V(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Samon(은)는 54세였다. 그는 대략 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 펠리스커크에서 Jane Curzon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 스퍼드실르 브라이트웰 볼드윈에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Southwell of Varnam Hall nasceu em 1425, em Feliskirk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Southwell V, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Samon, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Curzon aproximadamente 1442, em Feliskirk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1475, em Brightwell Baldwin, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Southwell of Varnam Hall родился в 1425 г. в местности фелискирк, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Southwell V было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Samon, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Curzon около 1442 г. в местности фелискирк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности браитвелл балдвин, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
